I'm constructing the homepage, integrating a horizontal scrolling marquee for the philosophy section, which will display "RESPECT - DIGNITY - CULTURE". The pillars section will use an accordion or "Hover to Expand" layout for organization.

I'm implementing "The Golden Thread" navigation with a thin gold line, a hanging logo, and menu "beads". I will be updating `index.html`, `components/Navbar.tsx`, `components/Hero.tsx`, and `pages/Home.tsx`, and `components/Footer.tsx`. The knowledge hub will look like a futuristic terminal.

My hero section will be the text "INSIZWA" and "NOBUNSIZWA" with a cutout man between the text. Routing in `App.tsx` must be preserved.
